docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAXAMANA, ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT NEVELO, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
